Petition To Approve Minors Compromise
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Jack Bollier Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Santo Fleri, father and guardian ad litem for Minor: Sofia Fleri, present in court. Julie Wayne, (mother) also present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded through Italian Interpreter Denise Dee Diaz.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $17,500.00
Attorney's Fees: $4,262.93 payable to The Cartwright Law Firm.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of: $448.29
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $4,711.25
A net balance of $12,788.78. The petitioner, Santo Fleri will be the custodian of the account, the funds of which must be managed for the benefit of the claimant, Sofia Fleri. A check fot the entire amount, $12,788.78, will be written to Santo Fleri, custodian for Sofia Fleri. UTMA.
Court signed Orde in open court.
